name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim for a work illness that showed up months later in Saint George?
description: Utah: 3 years from discovery for illnesses; act fast.[2]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim for a work illness that showed up months later in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah: 3 years from discovery for illnesses; act fast.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: In Utah, file within 3 years of injury/illness discovery or 12 years of exposure for occupational diseases.[2] Late claims risk denial if employer prejudiced.[3] Key factors: Date symptoms started, notice given, statute limits. Track medical records from onset; attorney can help meet deadlines and appeal denials.
